_comment: PER-CLIENT PROFILE. This repo is a neutral template: business identity lives as {{TOKENS}} and the namespace slug is 'client'. Fill every value below, then run setup/customize.ps1 to propagate it across the engine, website, and brain. See SETUP.md.
_slug_help: Structural namespace used in folder names, env-var prefix (CLIENT_), and /opt/client-* paths. Leave as 'client' unless you want a different stem; if you change it, customize.ps1 renames folders/paths/env accordingly.
site_description: Professional SEO services for example businesses.

business.brand_voice: Expert, straightforward, ROI-focused. Speak directly to the business owner and tie every recommendation to tangible outcomes (calls, booked jobs, revenue).

_tokens._comment: Map of template placeholders -> the config field customize.ps1 fills them from. Do not edit; this documents what gets replaced.
